  ⚠ statusLine refreshInterval not set on a cctally statusLine
      → Run `cctally setup` to add statusLine.refreshInterval, or set it manually — see docs/commands/statusline.md

      → No hook fired in last 24h. Restart Claude Code, or run `cctally setup`.

      → No hook has fired yet. Restart Claude Code.
